name: State Trajectory
description: Definition of the state trajectory STZ(f, x) of a system under input trajectory f and initial state x.

elements.text: STZ(f, x) = {(t, y): t ∈ TZ, y ∈ SZ, y = x if t = 0; y = NZ(STZ(f, x)(t-1), f(t-1)) if t ≠ 0}.
STZ(f, x)(t) is interpreted as the state of the system Z at time t given input f and initial state x.
